duas.title: Dua Alqama (Safwan)
duas.description: Dua Recited After Ziyarat Ashura : Dua popularly known as 'Alqamah' is named after the companion of Imam Sadiq (peace be upon him).However, Shaykh Abbas Qummi quotes traditions in Mafatih ul-Jinan that Imam Sadiq (peace be upon him) recited this dua in the presence of the companion Safwan, not Alqamah. Therefore,this supplication is also titled "Dua to be recited after Ziyarah Ashura" or "Dua Safwan".

segments.arabic: يَا اللَّهُ يَا اللَّهُ يَا اللَّهُ
segments.transliteration: ya allahu ya allahu ya allahu
segments.translation: O Allah! O Allah! O Allah!
O He Who responds to the prayer of the distressed!
O He Who relieves the agonies of the agonized!
O Aide of the callers for aid!
O Helper of those who cry for help!

segments.arabic: وَيَا مَنْ هُوَ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيَّ مِنْ حَبْلِ ٱلْوَرِيدِ
segments.transliteration: wa ya man huwa aqrabu ilayya min habli alwaridi
segments.translation: O He Who is nearer to me than my life-vein!

segments.arabic: وَيَا مَنْ يَحُولُ بَيْنَ ٱلْمَرْءِ وَقَلْبِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa ya man yahulu bayna almar'i wa qalbihi
segments.translation: O He Who intervenes between man and his heart!

segments.arabic: وَيَا مَنْ هُوَ بِٱلْمَنْظَرِ ٱلأَعْلَىٰ وَبِٱلأُفُقِ ٱلْمُبِينِ
segments.transliteration: wa ya man huwa bilmanzari al-a`la wa bil'ufuqi almubini
segments.translation: O He Who is in the Highest Position and in the Clear Horizon!

segments.arabic: وَيَا مَنْ هُوَ ٱلرَّحْمٰنُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ عَلَىٰ ٱلْعَرْشِ ٱسْتَوَىٰ
segments.transliteration: wa ya man huwa alrrahmanu alrrahimu `ala al`arshi istawa
segments.translation: O He Who is all-beneficent and all-merciful and is established on the Throne!

segments.arabic: وَيَا مَنْ يَعْلَمُ خَائِنَةَ ٱلأَعْيُنِ وَمَا تُخْفِي ٱلصُّدُورُ
segments.transliteration: wa ya man ya`lamu kha'inata al-a`yuni wa ma tukhfi alssuduru
segments.translation: O He Who knows the stealthy looks and that which the breasts conceal!

segments.arabic: وَيَا مَنْ لاَ يَخْفَىٰ عَلَيْهِ خَافِيَةٌ
segments.transliteration: wa ya man la yakhfa `alayhi khafiyatun
segments.translation: O He from Whom no secret can remain hidden!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لاَ تَشْتَبِهُ عَلَيْهِ ٱلأَصْوَاتُ
segments.translation: O He Whom is not confused by the many voices (that pray Him)!

segments.transliteration: wa ya man la tughallituhu alhajatu
segments.translation: O He Whom is not confounded by the many requests (that are raised to Him)!

segments.arabic: وَيَا مَنْ لاَ يُبْرِمُهُ إِلْحَاحُ ٱلْمُلِحِّينَ
segments.transliteration: wa ya man la yubrimuhu ilhahu almulihhina
segments.translation: O He Who is not annoyed by the insistence of those who entreat Him persistently!
O He Who overtakes every attempt of escape!
O Reunifier of every scattering thing!

segments.transliteration: wa ya bari'a alnnufusi ba`da almawti
segments.translation: O Re-originator of the souls after death!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ كُلِّ يَوْمٍ فِي شَأْنٍ
segments.transliteration: ya man huwa kulla yawmin fi sha'nin
segments.translation: O He Who is in a state every moment!
O Grantor of requests!
O Reliever of agonies!
O Conferrer of demands!
O Bestower of desires!
O Savior from sufferings!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ يَكْفِي مِنْ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ
segments.transliteration: ya man yakfi min kulli shay'in
segments.translation: O He Who can save from all things

segments.arabic: وَلاَ يَكْفِي مِنْهُ شَيْءٌ فِي ٱلسَّمَاوَاتِ وَٱلأَرْضِ
segments.transliteration: wa la yakfi minhu shay'un fi alssamawati wal-ardi
segments.translation: and nothing in the heavens or in the earth can save from Him!
I beseech You in the name of Muhammad the seal of the Prophets,
`Ali the commander of the faithful,
Fatimah the daughter of Your Prophet,
al-Hasan, and al-Husayn,

segments.arabic: فَإِنِّي بِهِمْ أَتَوَجَّهُ إِلَيْكَ فِي مَقَامِي هٰذَا
segments.transliteration: fa'inni bihim atawajjahu ilayka fi maqami hadha
segments.translation: for I turn my face towards You in their names at this very situation of mine,
I make them my means to You,
I seek their intercession for me with You,

segments.transliteration: wa bihaqqihim as'aluka wa uqsimu wa a`zimu `alayka
segments.translation: I beseech You in the name of Your duty towards them, I adjure You, and I beg You earnestly,
in the name of the status that they enjoy with You,
the value that they enjoy in Your sight,
in the name of the thing by which You have preferred them over all the other beings,
in the name of Your Name that You have placed with them
and given them exclusively other than all the other beings,
and through which You have distinguished them

segments.transliteration: wa abanta fadlahum min fadli al`alamina
segments.translation: and demonstrated their distinctive precedence over all the other beings so uniquely

segments.arabic: حَتَّىٰ فَاقَ فَضْلُهُمْ فَضْلَ ٱلْعَالَمِينَ جَمِيعاً
segments.transliteration: hatta faqa fadluhum fadla al`alamina jami`an
segments.translation: that their preference has exceeded all the distinctive features of all the other beings;

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: as'aluka an tusalliya `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin
segments.translation: I beseech You (in the name of all that) to send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
to relieve me from my distress,
grief, and agony,
to make up for me all my distressing affairs,
to help me settle my debts,
to safeguard me against poverty,
to safeguard me against scarcity,
to make me dispense with begging from the created beings,

segments.transliteration: wa takfiyani hamma man akhafu hammahu
segments.translation: to spare me from the distress of what I anticipate to distress me,
the difficulty of what I anticipate to be difficult for me,
the toughness of what I anticipate to be hard for me (to deal with),
the evil of what I anticipate to be evil,
the conspiracy of whom I anticipate to plot conspiracy (against me),
the tyranny of whom I anticipate to treat me tyrannically,
the injustice of whom I anticipate to be unjust to me
the domination of whom I anticipate to dominate me,
the trickery of whom I anticipate to trick me,
and the authority of whom I anticipate to seize me,
and to ward off from me the trickeries of the deceivers
and the cunning of the devious.
O Allah, stand for me against him who intends evil for me,
intrigue against him who intends to conspire against me,
turn away from me his trickeries, cunning,
influence, and evil desires,

segments.arabic: وَٱمْنَعْهُ عَنِّي كَيْفَ شِئْتَ وَأَنَّىٰ شِئْتَ
segments.transliteration: wamna`hu `anni kayfa shi'ta wa anna shi'ta
segments.translation: and prevent him against me in any way You choose and at any time You choose.
O Allah, (please) preoccupy him against me
by means of poverty that You never cut down,
ordeals that You never recover,
neediness that You never stop,
ailment that You never heal,
humility that You never change into dignity,
and destitution that You never cut down.
O Allah, (please) strike him with humility in the center of his eyes,
interleave poverty to his own house,
place ailment and disease in his body

segments.arabic: حَتَّىٰ تَشْغَلَهُ عَنِّي بِشُغْلٍ شَاغِلٍ لاَ فَرَاغَ لَهُ
segments.transliteration: hatta tashghalahu `anni bishughlin shaghilin la faragha lahu
segments.translation: so that You will preoccupy him with an engrossing, relentless preoccupation,

segments.transliteration: wa ansihi dhikri kama ansaytahu dhikraka
segments.translation: make him fail to remember me in the same was as he has failed to remember You,
divert from me his hearing, sight,
tongue, hand,
leg, heart,
and all of his organs,

segments.arabic: وَأَدْخِلْ عَلَيْهِ فِي جَمِيعِ ذٰلِكَ ٱلسُّقْمَ
segments.transliteration: wa adkhil `alayhi fi jami`i dhalika alssuqma
segments.translation: place in him sickness in all these (organs),

segments.arabic: وَلا تَشْفِهِ حَتَّىٰ تَجْعَلَ ذٰلِكَ لَهُ شُغْلاً شَاغِلاً بِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa la tashfihi hatta taj`ala dhalika lahu shughlan shaghilan bihi
segments.translation: and do not heal him so that all these (sicknesses) will preoccupy him relentlessly
from me and from mentioning me.

segments.arabic: وَٱكْفِنِي يَا كَافِي مَا لاَ يَكْفِي سِوَاكَ
segments.transliteration: wakfini ya kafi ma la yakfi siwaka
segments.translation: And spare me, O Savior, from all that which cannot be spared by anyone other than You,
for You are verily the Savior; and there is no savior other than You,
You are verily the Reliever, and there is no reliever other than You,
You are verily the Succorer, and there is no succorer other than You,
and You are verily the Shelterer, and there is no shelterer other than You.
Disappointed is he whose shelterer is other than You,
whose recourse to anywhere other than You,
whose resort is anywhere other than You,
whose way out is anywhere other than You,
whose haven is anywhere other than You,
and whose savior from any created being is anyone other than You.
You are verily my trust, my hope,
my resort, my way out,
my haven, and my savior.
With You do I commence
and through You do I seek success.
In the name of Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

segments.transliteration: atawajjahu ilayka wa atawassalu wa atashaffa`u
segments.translation: do I turn my face towards You, seek means to You, and seek intercession to You.

segments.arabic: فَأَسْأَلُكَ يَا اللَّهُ يَا اللَّهُ يَا اللَّهُ
segments.transliteration: fa'as'aluka ya allahu ya allahu ya allahu
segments.translation: So, I beseech You, O Allah! O Allah! O Allah!
Yours is all praise and Yours is all thanks.

segments.transliteration: wa ilayka almushtaka wa anta almusta`anu
segments.translation: To You is my complaint and You are the Besought for help.

segments.arabic: فَأَسْأَلُكَ يَا اللَّهُ يَا اللَّهُ يَا اللَّهُ
segments.transliteration: fa'as'aluka ya allahu ya allahu ya allahu
segments.translation: So, I beseech You, O Allah! O Allah! O Allah!
In the name of Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

segments.arabic: أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: an tusalliya `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin
segments.translation: to send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

segments.arabic: وَأَنْ تَكْشِفَ عَنِّي غَمِّي وَهَمِّي وَكَرْبِي
segments.transliteration: wa an takshifa `anni ghammi wa hammi wa karbi
segments.translation: and to relieve my distress, grief, and agony
in this situation of mine

segments.arabic: كَمَا كَشَفْتَ عَنْ نَبِيِّكَ هَمَّهُ وَغَمَّهُ وَكَرْبَهُ
segments.transliteration: kama kashafta `an nabiyyika hammahu wa ghammahu wa karbahu
segments.translation: in the same way as You have relieved the distress, grief, and agony of Your Prophet
and saved him from the horrors of his enemy.
So, (please) relieve me in the same way as You did to him,
dispel my worries in the same way as You did to him,
save me in the same way as You did to him,

segments.arabic: وَٱصْرِفْ عَنِّي هَوْلَ مَا أَخَافُ هَوْلَهُ
segments.translation: drive away from me the horror of what I anticipate to horrify me,
the encumbrance of what I anticipate to overburden me,
and the distress of what I anticipate to distress me

segments.arabic: بِلا مَؤُونَةٍ عَلَىٰ نَفْسِي مِنْ ذٰلِكَ
segments.translation: without making me suffer any encumbrance due to all that.
And make me leave having all my requests granted
and having all my distresses relieved,
including the affairs of this world and the Hereafter.
O Commander of the Faithful!
O Abu-`Abdullah!
Peace of Allah be upon you both from me forever

segments.transliteration: ma baqitu wa baqiya allaylu walnnaharu
segments.translation: as long as I am existent and as long as there are day and night.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ جَعَلَهُ ٱللَّهُ آخِرَ ٱلْعَهْدِ مِنْ زِيَارَتِكُمَا
segments.transliteration: wa la ja`alahu allahu akhira al`ahdi min ziyaratikuma
segments.translation: May Allah not decide this time of my visit to you both to be the last.

segments.transliteration: wa la farraqa allahu bayni wa baynakuma
segments.translation: May Allah never separate me from you both.

segments.transliteration: allahumma ahyini hayata muhammadin wa dhurriyyatihi
segments.translation: O Allah, (please) make me live the same lifestyle that Muhammad and his offspring lived,
make me die on the same faith on which they died,
receive my soul while I am following their religion,
include me with their group,

segments.transliteration: wa la tufarriq bayni wa baynahum
segments.translation: and never separate me from them
not for even a winking of any eye
in this world and in the Hereafter.
O Commander of the Faithful!
O Abu-`Abdullah!
I have come to you both to visit you,

segments.transliteration: wa mutawassilan ila allahi rabbi wa rabbikuma
segments.translation: making both of you to be my means to Allah your and my Lord,
turning my face to Him in your names,

segments.arabic: وَمُسْتَشْفِعاً بِكُمَا إِلَىٰ ٱللَّهِ تَعَالَىٰ فِي حَاجَتِي هٰذِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa mustashfi`an bikuma ila allahi ta`ala fi hajati hadhihi
segments.translation: and seeking your intercession for me with Allah All-exalted to grant me this request of mine;
so, intercede for me,

segments.arabic: فَإِنَّ لَكُمَا عِنْدَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلْمَقَامَ ٱلْمَحْمُودَ
segments.translation: since you both enjoy with Allah a praiseworthy position,
an admissible status,
a lofty standing, and a means (of nearness to Him).
I will now leave you both,
expecting my request to be granted,

segments.transliteration: wa qada'iha wa najahiha min allahi
segments.translation: settled, and made successful by Allah

segments.arabic: بِشَفَاعَتِكُمَا لِي إِلَىٰ ٱللَّهِ فِي ذٰلِكَ
segments.transliteration: bishafa`atikuma li ila allahi fi dhalika
segments.translation: on account of your intercession for me with Allah in that;
so, do not let me down

segments.arabic: وَلاَ يَكونُ مُنْقَلَبِي مُنْقَلَباً خَائِباً خَاسِراً
segments.transliteration: wa la yakunu munqalabi munqalaban kha'iban khasiran
segments.translation: and do not make me leave with disappointment and loss;
rather, make me leave with achievement,
prosperity, success, and response (of my prayers)
by having all my requests granted.
And (please) intercede for me with Allah recurrently.
I now leave on ‘whatever is willed by Allah shall come to pass’

segments.arabic: وَلا حَوْلَ وَلا قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: wa la hawla wa la quwwata illa billahi
segments.translation: and ‘there is neither might nor power except with Allah’,
relegating all my affairs to Allah,
referring all my power to Allah,
depending upon Allah,

segments.transliteration: wa aqulu hasbiya allahu wa kafa
segments.translation: and repeating, ‘Allah is only sufficient to me,’
and ‘May Allah respond to him who prays Him.’
Other than Allah
and other than you all, O my masters, I have nothing to put my hope in.
Only that which my Lord wills shall come to pass,

segments.transliteration: wa ma lam yasha' lam yakun
segments.translation: and whatever He does not will shall never be.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: wa la hawla wa la quwwata illa billahi
segments.translation: There is neither might nor power except with Allah.
I entrust you both with Allah.

segments.arabic: وَلا جَعَلَهُ ٱللَّهُ آخِرَ ٱلْعَهْدِ مِنِّي إِلَيْكُمَا
segments.transliteration: wa la ja`alahu allahu akhira al`ahdi minni ilaykuma
segments.translation: May Allah never decide this time of my visit to you both to be the last.

segments.arabic: إِنْصَرَفْتُ يَا سَيِّدِي يَا أَمِيرَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَمَوْلاَي
segments.transliteration: insaraftu ya sayyidi ya amira almu'minina wa mawlaya
segments.translation: May I now leave, O my master, O Commander of the faithful

segments.arabic: وَأَنْتَ يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ يَا سَيِّدِي
segments.transliteration: wa anta ya aba `abdillahi ya sayyidi
segments.translation: and you O Abu-`Abdullah, O my master.
My greetings to you both are as continuous
as night and day.
May my greetings reach you both (all the time)
and my salutation never be screened from reaching you both,
Allah willing.

segments.arabic: وَأَسْأَلُهُ بِحَقِّكُمَا أَنْ يَشَاءَ ذٰلِكَ وَيَفْعَلَ
segments.transliteration: wa as'aluhu bihaqqikuma an yasha'a dhalika wa yaf`ala
segments.translation: I also beseech Him in your names to determine and do that,
for He is verily the owner of praise and the owner of glory.
I am now leaving you both, O my masters,
repenting to and praising Allah,
and thanking Him and hoping Him to respond to me;
I neither despair nor lose hope,
and I intend to come back, return, revisit you both,

segments.arabic: غَيْرَ رَاغِبٍ عَنْكُمَا وَلاَ عَنْ زِيَارَتِكُمَا
segments.translation: while I have never desired to leave you or to abandon visiting you;

segments.arabic: بَلْ رَاجِعٌ عَائِدٌ إِنْ شَاءَ ٱللَّهُ
segments.translation: rather, I shall return and come back, if Allah wills.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: wa la hawla wa la quwwata illa billahi
segments.translation: There is neither might nor power except with Allah.

segments.arabic: يَا سَادَتِي رَغِبْتُ إِلَيْكُمَا وَإِلَىٰ زِيَارَتِكُمَا
segments.transliteration: ya sadati raghibtu ilaykuma wa ila ziyaratikuma
segments.translation: O my masters, I do desire for both of you and for visiting you

segments.arabic: بَعْدَ أَنْ زَهِدَ فِيكُمَا وَفِي زِيَارَتِكُمَا أَهْلُ ٱلدُّنْيَا
segments.transliteration: ba`da an zahida fikuma wa fi ziyaratikuma ahlu alddunya
segments.translation: although the people of this world (may) abandon you both or abandon visiting you.

segments.arabic: فَلاَ خَيَّبَنِيَ ٱللَّهُ مِمَّا رَجَوْتُ وَمَا أَمَّلْتُ فِي زِيَارَتِكُمَا
segments.transliteration: fala khayyabaniya allahu mimma rajawtu wa ma ammaltu fi ziyaratikuma
segments.translation: May Allah never make me fail to attain what I have hoped and desired in visiting you both.
Verily, He is All-nigh, All-responding.

duas.reference: Shaykh al-Tusi narrated this supplication in his book, Misbah al-Mutahajjid.
